name: Dancing Sword
type: Weapon (Greatsword, Longsword, Rapier, Scimitar, or Shortsword)
overview: A magical sword that can fly and attack independently while hovering.

properties.activation: You can take a Bonus Action to toss this magic weapon into the air
properties.hovering: When you do so, the weapon begins to hover, flies up to 30 feet, and attacks one creature of your choice within 5 feet of itself
properties.attack_rolls: The weapon uses your attack roll and adds your ability modifier to damage rolls

while_hovering.movement: You can take a Bonus Action to cause it to fly up to 30 feet to another spot within 30 feet of you
while_hovering.attacks: As part of the same Bonus Action, you can cause the weapon to attack one creature within 5 feet of the weapon

return_condition.trigger: After the hovering weapon attacks for the fourth time
return_condition.behavior: It flies back to you and tries to return to your hand. If you have no hand free, the weapon falls to the ground in your space
return_condition.obstruction: If the weapon has no unobstructed path to you, it moves as close to you as it can and then falls to the ground

hover_cessation.conditions: It also ceases to hover if you grasp it or are more than 30 feet away from it
